title: Donuts
description: A simple donut mod focused on simplicity.
body:
# About the mod
This is a Donut (also called Doughnuts) mod designed for **1.16.5**. As the name suggests, this mod adds a multitude of Donuts and Donut varieties which include:
* Ring Donuts (The classic donut shape)
* Filled Donuts (Similar to rings, but without the hole)
* Donut Holes (A type of small donut, obtained when cutting rings)
* Potato Donuts (Also known as "Spudnuts". This is the first minecraft mod to include Potato donuts, as no other mod has them.)

There are also a lot of flavors! Such as sugar, sweet berries and honey; this mod supports Croptopia, you can combine caramel, peanut butter or jams to make the respective flavors!

<details>
<summary>Flavors</summary>
Below are all the variations for the different donuts.

![A grid describing which donuts are available](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33117e42dd6bc5d7cf13fbc4818fb97cac6807c1.png)
Each jam has it's own donut!

![The jam versions of the donuts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/398b8286afcb469598b058d55d67343b0efc654f.png)
</details>
More could come eventually as I progress with development!

# Crafting
Everything in this mod is craftable, the Croptopia related items (Jam donuts, Peanut Butter donuts and Caramel donuts) are only craftable if the Croptopia mod is installed.
JEI is reccomended to check the recipes.
The spoiler below contains most of the recipes.

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>
  
**Raw Donuts**


<details>
<summary>Create mod Recipes</summary>

Raw Filled Donut:

![Recipe for the raw filled donut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e949bbad439b54cf328247ea6c8891bba023b44f.png)

Raw Donut and Donut Hole:

![recipe for the donut and donut hole](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d44cde0eed602bfca92d06116ca62b52281a318.png)

Raw Potato Donut:

![Potato donut recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6df3bae9cfb5dd44eb130828b3c6fe9cd3c09ff.png)

**Other recipes:**

* To cook the Donuts, you can use an encased fan behind a fire to smoke them.
* To make a honey donut, you must place a Donut on a depot below a Spout
* To make any other flavor you must deploy the ingredients or mix them in a basin

</details>



![A recipe showing how the base donut is crafted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68880472d85dfa484140f53532f1c0b45f16415e.png)

![The recipe for the filled donut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6feea73a8c524de0eeea4c8d6dafcf85203bb82.png)

![The recipe for potato donuts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92cbae08cedfa80c787565ddb1f1840b68d1d85f.png)

![The donut hole recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ebea3313d2b86adceebdad38eab703c93f97fd5_0.webp)

**Donuts with sugar or glazed**

![Recipe for the sweet berry donut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c88ad5c421485258ac52ac16675d7112434337a.png)

* _This Recipe is variable, you can use any valid ingredient with any valid donut, the Image in the 'Flavors' spoiler has all valid combinations._

**Special donuts**

![Smiley recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87c44712883d95745190c0140188ed9ea0548a89.png)

![Special construction recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23d0f6fde33a2c445c02f874dee75b09491766a7.png)

**_Filled Donut only recipe_**

![Recipe for glazed special donut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54ddd599f1f1ebda4ff5c6a1e974ab9ab0dc77cf.png)

</details>

## Cooking
All donuts have to be cooked. You need a smoker to cook the donuts.

# Planned
Since this mod is still in development, here is a list of the next additions I plan to add.

### Planned by 1.0:
* More 'Special' donuts
* Locales for languages I speak

### Planned by 1.1+
* Fork to newer versions
* Locales for languages I don't speak
* Even more special Donuts
* Full Create compatibility


<details>
<summary>Translation</summary>

Current translations:
* Esperanto
* Italian
* English
* German

Planned for 1.0:
* Dutch
* Russian

</details>
